TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Irou ka irou'ato tyni-an ta Fariseen lam ki Sadduceen rihpung, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ka pa-kytta-ah neini-æn ki pou-ki-di-en ka makka-vullum.
Irou ka irou'ato tyni-an ta Fariseen lam ki Sadduceen rihpung, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn ka pa-kytta-ah neini-æn ki pou-kidi-en ka makka-vullum.
S.TRANSL: Ende de Phariseen ende Sadduceen tot Hem gegekomen zijnde nde [hem] bersoeckende degeerden ban hem dat hn hae een teecken upt den Hemel soude toonen,
The Pharisees also with the Sadducees came, and tempting desired him that he would shew them a sign from heaven.
法利賽人和撒都該人來試探耶穌，請他從天上顯個神蹟給他們看。

S.FORM: Râ teni ta ni-mattæ'i-vli k'ma neini-æn, Irou ka madoung k'ma-kamou ki sounda, Matika-nagh-al-ato, alei ka meip-hang ta vullum.
Râ teni ta ni-mattæ'i-vli k'ma neini-æn, Irou ka madoung k'ma-kamou ki sounda, Matika-nagh-al-ato, alei ka meip-hang ta vullum.
S.TRANSL: WMaer hy antwoordde ende seyde tot haer Als het abont gheworden is feght ghy Schoon weder want de Hemel is root.
He answered and said unto them, When it is evening, ye say, It will be fair weather: for the sky is red.
耶穌回答說：「晚上天發紅，你們就說：『天必要晴。』

S.FORM: . Dou madama, Bajoug-hah, alei ka meip-hang kyvoulas-en ta vullum. Emoumi ka pa-nni-nni-en ki ryh ki sou,ou-mha-noumi mou-piri ki hauwei ki vullum, ka assi-moumi ou-mh'an [moupiri] ki pou-kidi-en ki kidi [ki tauwil?]

. Dou madama, Bajoug-hah, alei ka meip-hang kyvoulas-en ta vullum. Emoumi ka pa-nni-nni-en ki ryh ki sou,ou-mha-noumi mou-piri ki hauwei ki vullum, ka assi-moumi ou-mh'an [moupiri] ki pou-kidi-en ki kidi [ki tauwil?]
S.TRANSL: Ende des morghens Heden onwede want den Hemelis droebig root . Ghy gebeynide het aenschyn des HÃžHemels weet ghy wel te onderschepden ende en kont ghy de teeckenen der tyden niet [onderscheyden ? ]
And in the morning, It will be foul weather to day: for the sky is red and lowering. O ye hypocrites, ye can discern the face of the sky; but can ye not discern the signs of the times?
早晨天發紅，又發黑，你們就說：『今日必有風雨。』你們知道分辨天上的氣色，倒不能分辨這時候的神蹟。

S.FORM: Kavouyvouyl-lan ka ma't'e ka tama-rarbourbo, tmoumimia ki pou-kidi-en: ka assi p'a-an-eih neini-æn ta pou-kidi-en dyk ki na poukakidi ki Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka ti Jonas. Irou ka pa-itoukaqua neini-æn, ni-darang-en tyn-râ.

Kavouyvouyl-lan ka ma't'e ka tama-rarbourbo, tmoumimia ki pou-kidi-en: ka assi p'a-an-eih neini-æn ta pou-kidi-en dyk ki na poukakidi ki Tama-mattæ'i-tan ka ti Jonas. Irou ka pa-itoukaqua neini-æn, ni-darang-en tyn-râ.
S.TRANSL: Het boos ende obesspeligh geflachte bersoeckt een teecken: ende [ haer] en sal gheen teecken gegeben worden dan het teecken Jone des Propheten. Ende haer berlatende gingh hy wech.
A wicked and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given unto it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas. And he left them, and departed.
一個邪惡淫亂的世代求神蹟，除了約拿的神蹟以外，再沒有神蹟給他看。」耶穌就離開他們去了。 （可8‧14－21）

S.FORM: Irou ka irou-ato ta Pahta. tutæu-han tyn tou sait ka tou arough, ni-hou-by-ngnarup-pen nein kei-ul ki paoul.
Irou ka irou-ato ta Pahta. tutæu-han tyn tou sait ka tou arough, ni-hou-by-ngnarup-pen nein kei-ul ki paoul.
S.TRANSL: Ende als lhne Difcipelenop d'ander rijde gekomen waren hadden p bergeten brooden [mede] te nemen.
And when his disciples were come to the other side, they had forgotten to take bread.
門徒渡到那邊去，忘了帶餅。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Kmyttâ, saou-kavierrâ ki ni-pei-apyngit ki Fariseen ki Saddu-ceen-appa.
Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Kmyttâ, saou-kavierrâ ki ni-pei-apyngit ki Fariseen ki Saddu-ceen-appa.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus leyde tor haer Siet toe ende wacht u ban den suer deefsem der Phariseen ende Sadduceen.
Then Jesus said unto them, Take heed and beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees.
耶穌對他們說：「你們要謹慎，防備法利賽人和撒都該人的酵。」

S.FORM: Neni-râ ni-pæh-alalei pæh-dimdim pæh-madou neini-æn, koun, Alei ka assi-kytta ahkei-ul ki paoul [ta anna.]
Neni-râ ni-pæh-alalei pæh-dimdim pæh-madou neini-æn, koun, Alei ka assi-kytta ahkei-ul ki paoul [ta anna.]
S.TRANSL: Ende sy oberleyden by hae: selben seggende [is] om dat wn gheen brooden[mede] genomen en hebben,
And they reasoned among themselves, saying, It is because we have taken no bread.
門徒彼此議論說：「這是因為我們沒有帶餅吧。」

S.FORM: Ka rou oum-h'an ti Jesus [ta atta] ni-koun tyn neini-æn, Kamang ta pah-alalei 'noumi pah-raryh, ymoumi ka oussyng ki tna-msing-an, ka assi-moumi ah-kakei-ul ta paoul?
Ka rou oum-h'an ti Jesus [ta atta] ni-koun tyn neini-æn, Kamang ta pah-alalei 'noumi pah-raryh, ymoumi ka oussyng ki tna-msing-an, ka assi-moumi ah-kakei-ul ta paoul?
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus [dat] wetende sepde tot haer Wat oberleght ghy by u selben ghy kleyn-gheloobige dat ghy geen brooden [mede]genomen en hebt
Which when Jesus perceived, he said unto them, O ye of little faith, why reason ye among yourselves, because ye have brought no bread?
耶穌看出來，就說：「你們這小信的人，為甚麼因為沒有餅彼此議論呢？

S.FORM: Assi-appa moumi oum-han, assi-moumi pæh-balei-en pah-dim-dim ta ryrymma ki paoul, ki rÿm-ma katounnoun-nan [ka papæ-ræh] ka pyppynna ka læ'i-an ka ni-a-likough-noumi illud?
Assi-appa moumi oum-han, assi-moumi pæh-balei-en pah-dim-dim ta ryrymma ki paoul, ki rÿm-ma katounnoun-nan [ka papæ-ræh] ka pyppynna ka læ'i-an ka ni-a-likough-noumi illud?
S.TRANSL: En bestaet ghp noch niet # noch en gedenckt ghy niet aen de bijf brooden Der biif duysent [ mannen, ] ende Hoe beel korben ghy op naemt
Do ye not yet understand, neither remember the five loaves of the five thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?
你們還不明白嗎？不記得那五個餅分給五千人、又收拾了多少籃子的零碎嗎？

S.FORM: Ta pyppytto-appa ki paoul, ki hpat katounoun-nan [ki pæpæ-rah, ka pyppynna ka læ'i-æn ta ni-a-likough-noumi illud?
Ta pyppytto-appa ki paoul, ki hpat katounoun-nan [ki pæpæ-rah, ka pyppynna ka læ'i-æn ta ni-a-likough-noumi illud?
S.TRANSL: Noch aen de seben brooden der bier dupsent [mannen, Jende hoe beel manden ghy op-naemt
Neither the seven loaves of the four thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?
也不記得那七個餅分給四千人、又收拾了多少筐子的零碎嗎？

S.FORM: Mamamang ka assi-moumi oumhan, ka assi-mau-kamou ni-passousou-en ki paoul, [rou ni-koua-au-kamou] ka saou kavier-ah-kamou ki ni-pei-apyngit ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen-appa?
Mamamang ka assi-moumi oumhan, ka assi-mau-kamou ni-passousou-en ki paoul, [rou ni-koua-au-kamou] ka saou kavier-ah-kamou ki ni-pei-apyngit ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen-appa?
S.TRANSL: How is it that ye do not understand that I spake it not to you concerning bread, that ye should beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees?
我對你們說：『要防備法利賽人和撒都該人的酵』，這話不是指着餅說的，你們怎麼不明白呢？」

S.FORM: Anna ta oumhan nein, ka assi ni-k'ma, ka saou-kavier-ah ki ni-pei-apyngit ki paoul-rå, ki pæh-tatautæu-en-appa ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen.
Anna ta oumhan nein, ka assi ni-k'ma, ka saou-kavier-ah ki ni-pei-apyngit ki paoul-rå, ki pæh-tatautæu-en-appa ki Fariseen ki Sadduceen.
S.TRANSL: Boe berftonden fp dat hy niet gesegt en hadde dat sy haer wachten fouden ban den suer-deessem des broods maer ban de leere der Phariseen ende Sadduceen
Then understood they how that he bade them not beware of the leaven of bread, but of the doctrine of the Pharisees and of the Sadducees.
門徒這才曉得他說的不是叫他們防備餅的酵，乃是防備法利賽人和撒都該人的教訓。 （可8‧27－30；路9‧18－21）

S.FORM: Ka dou irou-'an ti Jesus tou kidi ki pourough kipassarea ka na ti Filippus, ni-tmaligh ki Pæh-tatæutæu-han tyn, koun, Timang koumma jau-an ta tau, ka Alak-koh ki ka'æuloung ti jau?
Ka dou irou-'an ti Jesus tou kidi ki pourough kipassarea ka na ti Filippus, ni-tmaligh ki Pæh-tatæutæu-han tyn, koun, Timang koumma jau-an ta tau, ka Alak-koh ki ka'æuloung ti jau?
S.TRANSL: Alsnn Jesus ghekomen was in de deelen Cesaree Philippi braeghde hy syne Difcipelen segghende Wie seggen demenschen dat ick de Zone des menschen ben :
When Jesus came into the coasts of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, saying, Whom do men say that I the Son of man am?
耶穌到了凱撒利亞‧腓立比的境內，就問門徒說：「人說我－－人子是誰？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta neni, Ta rou-ma, ka ti Joannes [kow] ka na Tama-'eulough, ta rouma, ka ti Elias [kow], ta rouma-râ ka ti Je remias [kow], ki saät lava ki na Tama-mattæi-tan.
Ka ni-k'ma ta neni, Ta rou-ma, ka ti Joannes [kow] ka na Tama-'eulough, ta rouma, ka ti Elias [kow], ta rouma-râ ka ti Je remias [kow], ki saät lava ki na Tama-mattæi-tan.
S.TRANSL: Ende sy sepden Sommige Joannes de Doope ende andere Elias mde andere Jeremias ofte ten ban de Propheten.
And they said, Some say that thou art John the Baptist: some, Elias; and others, Jeremias, or one of the prophets.
他們說：「有人說是施洗的約翰；有人說是以利亞；又有人說是耶利米或是先知裏的一位。」

S.FORM: Nik'ma neini-æn, Ymou mi-râ, timang -k'ma-ka-mou jæu-an?
Nik'ma neini-æn, Ymou mi-râ, timang -k'ma-ka-mou jæu-an?
S.TRANSL: Hy eyde tot haer Maer ghy wie seght ghy dat ick bens
He saith unto them, But whom say ye that I am?
耶穌說：「你們說我是誰？」

S.FORM: Ni-pattæi-bli-en ti Simon Petrus, ka k'ma, Ti ihristus kow, ka Alak ki Alid ka mæuagh.
Ni-pattæi-bli-en ti Simon Petrus, ka k'ma, Ti ihristus kow, ka Alak ki Alid ka mæuagh.
S.TRANSL: Ende Simon Petrus antwoordende sepde Ghy zijt de Chiiltus de Sone des lebendigen Godts.
And Simon Peter answered and said, Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living God.
西門‧彼得回答說：「你是基督，是永生上帝的兒子。」

S.FORM: Karou mattæ'i-vli ta ti Je-sus ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-tæi-riang kow Simon Bar-Jona: alei ka assi pa-ou-mha-ato ki atta ym-hou-an ta vaät ki amagh, râ Ra-man-appa mau ka itou-tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
Karou mattæ'i-vli ta ti Je-sus ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Tama-tæi-riang kow Simon Bar-Jona: alei ka assi pa-ou-mha-ato ki atta ym-hou-an ta vaät ki amagh, râ Ra-man-appa mau ka itou-tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: EndeJesus antwoordende sepde tot hem Saligh Zyt ghy Simon Bar Jona: want bleefch ende bloedt en heeft u [dat]niet gheopenbaert maer mijn Dader die inde Hemelen is.
And Jesus answered and said unto him, Blessed art thou, Simon Barjona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven.
耶穌對他說：「西門‧巴‧約拿，你是有福的！因為這不是屬血肉的指示你的，乃是我在天上的父指示的。

S.FORM: Ka koun-nappa kow ka ti Petrus kow, ka tou halap ki Pe-tra katta pei-s'hut-ei-mau mei-ryngei ki Pakoi-sasaal-lan-au, ka assitmounoun-nah ki atta ta ngatas ki kalæu-hæu-en.
Ka koun-nappa kow ka ti Petrus kow, ka tou halap ki Pe-tra katta pei-s'hut-ei-mau mei-ryngei ki Pakoi-sasaal-lan-au, ka assitmounoun-nah ki atta ta ngatas ki kalæu-hæu-en.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick segghe n oock dat ghy rije Petrus ende op dee Petra sal ick mijn Gemepnte bouwen esi de poorten der Helle en sullen deselbe niet oberweldigen, -
And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it.
我還告訴你，你是彼得，我要把我的教會建造在這磐石上；陰間的權柄不能勝過他。

S.FORM: Ka pha 'nei-mæu-kow ta a'au-alilib ki Pei-sasou-an ki toun-noun ki vulluvullum: ka kama-mang ka vauut-au-'mhou tou Næi, væuut-an-eil-ato tou toun-noun ki vulluvullum. Râ kama-mang. ka æ'au-vavæuut-ei-'mhou tou Næi, ææu-vavæu-ut-eih tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum.

Ka pha 'nei-mæu-kow ta a'au-alilib ki Pei-sasou-an ki toun-noun ki vulluvullum: ka kama-mang ka vauut-au-'mhou tou Næi, væuut-an-eil-ato tou toun-noun ki vulluvullum. Râ kama-mang. ka æ'au-vavæuut-ei-'mhou tou Næi, ææu-vavæu-ut-eih tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick salu geben de flentelen ban het Koninckriick der Hemelen:ende foo wat ghy sult binden op der aeeden al in de Hemelen ghebonden zijn. Ende soo wat ghy ontbinden sult op der aerden sal in de Hemelen ontbonden zijn.
And I will give unto thee the keys of the kingdom of heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.
我要把天國的鑰匙給你，凡你在地上所捆綁的，在天上也要捆綁；凡你在地上所釋放的，在天上也要釋放。」

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-ma-vagh ki Pahtatautau-han tyn, kassi banavana-ah ty mamang-an ka ti Jesus ta teni ka ti ahristus.
Tou kidi k'anna ni-ma-vagh ki Pahtatautau-han tyn, kassi banavana-ah ty mamang-an ka ti Jesus ta teni ka ti ahristus.
S.TRANSL: Doe Boe berboodt hy shne. Discipelen dat sy niemant segghen en souden dat hy was Jesns de Ehriltus.
Then charged he his disciples that they should tell no man that he was Jesus the Christ.
當下，耶穌囑咐門徒，不可對人說他是基督。 （可8‧31－9‧1；路9‧22－27）

S.FORM: Tou kidi-appa k'anna ni-mæi-næunamou ta ti Jesus vanna-vanna ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn,ka kidi-ato ki darang-eih tyn mou-koua tou Jerusalem, ka tub'-hah ki madagh neini-æn ka Mamou-mou [ki tau,]ka Si-bavau ka Ta-ma-p'hik, ka Makou-sasoulat, ka paka-patei-auh, ka pa-pætti-mau-aeil-appa tou katatouro ki wæ'i.

Tou kidi-appa k'anna ni-mæi-næunamou ta ti Jesus vanna-vanna ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn,ka kidi-ato ki darang-eih tyn mou-koua tou Jerusalem, ka tub'-hah ki madagh neini-æn ka Mamou-mou [ki tau,]ka Si-bavau ka Ta-ma-p'hik, ka Makou-sasoulat, ka paka-patei-auh, ka pa-pætti-mau-aeil-appa tou katatouro ki wæ'i.
S.TRANSL: Pan doen aen begon Jesus sijne Dilciptlen te bertoonen dat hy moeste hemen gaen nae Jerulalem ende bele lijden ban de Ouderlingen ende Oberpiielteren ende Schiift-geleerden ende gedoode worden ende ten erden daghe opgheweckc worden.

From that time forth began Jesus to shew unto his disciples, how that he must go unto Jerusalem, and suffer many things of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and be raised again the third day.
從此，耶穌才指示門徒，他必須上耶路撒冷去，受長老、祭司長、文士許多的苦，並且被殺，第三日復活。

S.FORM: Trou ka ni-pa-toulam tyni-æn ta ti Petrus, ni-kmæ-i-nauna-mou matymha tyni-æn, koun, Mei-rang maharum-mâ ymhou-an, assi pavut-anh ta atta ymhou-an.
Trou ka ni-pa-toulam tyni-æn ta ti Petrus, ni-kmæ-i-nauna-mou matymha tyni-æn, koun, Mei-rang maharum-mâ ymhou-an, assi pavut-anh ta atta ymhou-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende Petrughem tot sich genome hebbende begon b te beli affen seggende eere [zijt] u genadigh : dit en sal n geenfins geschieden.
Then Peter took him, and began to rebuke him, saying, Be it far from thee, Lord: this shall not be unto thee.
彼得就拉着他，勸他說：「主啊，萬不可如此！這事必不臨到你身上。」

S.FORM: Râ teni rou ni-ma'æu-douma tyni-æn, ni-k'ma ti Petrus an, 'arang-â Tama-makou-dou-ma mourikour jæu-an, ka pa-ræu ræu kow jau-an: ka assi kow pæh-arpit pæh-dimdim ka à tou Alid: dyk ka à tou ka'æuloung-da,

Râ teni rou ni-ma'æu-douma tyni-æn, ni-k'ma ti Petrus an, 'arang-â Tama-makou-dou-ma mourikour jæu-an, ka pa-ræu ræu kow jau-an: ka assi kow pæh-arpit pæh-dimdim ka à tou Alid: dyk ka à tou ka'æuloung-da,
S.TRANSL: Maerhyhemomkeerende eyde cot Petrum Gaet wech achter my Satana: ghy rhjt my een aenftoot: want ghy en besfint niet DE dingen die Godts zijn mae? Die der menschen zijn.
But he turned, and said unto Peter, Get thee behind me, Satan: thou art an offence unto me: for thou savourest not the things that be of God, but those that be of men.
耶穌轉過來，對彼得說：「撒但，退我後邊去吧！你是絆我腳的；因為你不體貼上帝的意思，只體貼人的意思。」

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Pahtatæutau-han tyn, Timamang ta mamoei mææuugh mouqua jau-an-nda, rmau-à mad-dotyni-æn, mara-a ka navæværægh tyn, ka smala-dylloum-à jau-an.
Tou kidi k'anna ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ki Pahtatæutau-han tyn, Timamang ta mamoei mææuugh mouqua jau-an-nda, rmau-à mad-dotyni-æn, mara-a ka navæværægh tyn, ka smala-dylloum-à jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Doe sepde Jesus tot thne Discipelen Soo yemant achter my wil komen Die berloochene hem-sflben ende neeme fijn kmys op ende bolge my,
Then said Jesus unto his disciples, If any man will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me.
於是耶穌對門徒說：「若有人要跟從我，就當捨己，背起他的十字架來跟從我。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta mamoei 'hma ki kæuag-han tyn, ataurum-ma-æh ki anna: rå ti mamang ta pataurumia-al-ato ki kæuag-han tyn alei jau-an, smou-valei-ah ki anna.
Ka timamang ta mamoei 'hma ki kæuag-han tyn, ataurum-ma-æh ki anna: rå ti mamang ta pataurumia-al-ato ki kæuag-han tyn alei jau-an, smou-valei-ah ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Want soo wit sYi leben sal willen behouden die sal her selbeberliesen : mats ger foo wie fijn leben berliefen fal om mijnent wille die sal het selbe binden. |
For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for my sake shall find it.
因為，凡要救自己生命的，必喪掉生命；凡為我喪掉生命的，必得着生命。

S.FORM: Ka akou-than ki mang ta ka'æuloung, ka pa pouthan-nen tyn tyni-æn ta ymmid ki Næi, rou mahavoung ki vatte tyn? Kamang-alato lava ta papap-æ ki ta'u, ka pa-viri-eih ki vatte tyn?
Ka akou-than ki mang ta ka'æuloung, ka pa pouthan-nen tyn tyni-æn ta ymmid ki Næi, rou mahavoung ki vatte tyn? Kamang-alato lava ta papap-æ ki ta'u, ka pa-viri-eih ki vatte tyn?
S.TRANSL: Want wat batet een mensche soo hy de geheele werelt ghewint ende lydt fchade syner riele 4 Ofte wat sal een mensche geben tot lossinge ban sijne riele $
For what is a man profited, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? or what shall a man give in exchange for his soul?
人若賺得全世界，賠上自己的生命，有甚麼益處呢？人還能拿甚麼換生命呢？

S.FORM: Ka koumma-al-ato-hynna ka ierou-'æh ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou keirang-en ki kidi ki Rama tyn lam ki Tama-gnau tyn, ka tou kidi k'anna pa'a-vli-ah ki Meig-bovoel ki na poungas tyn.
Ka koumma-al-ato-hynna ka ierou-'æh ta Alak ki ka'æuloung tou keirang-en ki kidi ki Rama tyn lam ki Tama-gnau tyn, ka tou kidi k'anna pa'a-vli-ah ki Meig-bovoel ki na poungas tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want de Sone des WMenschen sal komen in de heerlickhepdt cijns Daders met shne Engelen ende als dan sal hy cen pegelick bergelden na syn doen, _
For the Son of man shall come in the glory of his Father with his angels; and then he shall reward every man according to his works.
人子要在他父的榮耀裏，同着眾使者降臨；那時候，他要照各人的行為報應各人。

S.FORM: D'lligh koun-næu-kamou râ, akou-mea ta rarouma ki mi-touhko hia, ka assi kdiman-ah ki kapatei-an, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka kytta-eil-ato nein ta Alak ki ka'æuloung iroua tou Pei-sasou-an tyn. Kasasat kytti-an 'ab ki pyttou ki Ibæh ki soulat.

D'lligh koun-næu-kamou râ, akou-mea ta rarouma ki mi-touhko hia, ka assi kdiman-ah ki kapatei-an, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka kytta-eil-ato nein ta Alak ki ka'æuloung iroua tou Pei-sasou-an tyn. Kasasat kytti-an 'ab ki pyttou ki Ibæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Yoorwaer segge ick u Daer zijn sommighe ban die bier staen dewelcke den doodt niet imaken en cullen tot dat sy den Sone des Wenschen ullen hebben sien komt in syn Koninckrijcke.
Verily I say unto you, There be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the Son of man coming in his kingdom.
我實在告訴你們，站在這裏的，有人在沒嘗死味以前必看見人子降臨在他的國裏。」
